{{video}}

[[Category:Firmlaw]]
[[Category:video stubs]]
[[sn:Firmlaw (video)]][[sn:Firmlaw (video)]]Conclusion of the [[Seven Vaccines]] video series. Not very well done as it is based on the old idea of the [[Sevenfold Vaccine]] rather than the updated [[Ninefold Vaccine]] system
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
